text: I am surrounded by sleek, modern surfaces and vivid colors—glass, metal, and bright lighting. The exhibition space feels both sterile and filled with potential, an intersection between technological progress and human curiosity. The wall’s text about research and development reminds me of our constant pursuit of understanding and advancement, and standing here, I feel a sense of anticipation, as though I am on the edge of discovery, yet also somewhat small within this precise, controlled environment.
